description: GraphQL mutations to create a 5S report with sample data
instructions: Execute these mutations in order: 1) Create Report, 2) Create Categories using report ID, 3) Create Statements using category IDs

step1_createReport.mutation: mutation CreateReport($input: CreateReportInput!) { createReport(input: $input) { id name type user_sub ownerEmail organizationID completed } }

step2_createCategory_example.mutation: mutation CreateCategories($input: CreateCategoriesInput!) { createCategories(input: $input) { id name reportID orderIndex } }

input.name: Sort
input.description: Assessment of Sort practices in Main Production Floor

step3_createStatement_example.mutation: mutation CreateStatements($input: CreateStatementsInput!) { createStatements(input: $input) { id name value categoriesID } }

input.name: The area is clear of excess equipment, paperwork, or other types of materials.
